action.reasoning: Observation: 4-model ensemble at 0.8009 confirmed best. With 4 iterations and 4.17h left, risk-averse approach. Adding more models has diminishing/negative returns. Analysis: I could try weighted ensemble (give higher weight to better models) or try one more carefully-trained model. Since 5-model with cnxt_hires2 got 0.8006 (very close), maybe weighted ensemble with cnxt_hires2 would help. Actually safest: try weighted ensemble where models with higher individual val_acc get more weight. Let me try including all 5 but with a soft weighting. Decision: Try weighted ensemble: include cnxt_hires2 with reduced weight, see if it helps. If not, revert.
